code:
import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errors: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = list.push(errors, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errors = list.push(errors, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errors = list.push(errors, "too-old")
  end
  errors
end

fn format_result(_ errors: List<String>) -> String
  if errors.len() == 0
    "ok"
  else
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < errors.len()
      let item = match errors.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      if i == 0
        result = item
      else
        result = "#{result},#{item}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    "errors=#{result}"
  end
end

println(format_result(validate("", -5)))
println(format_result(validate("Alice", 30)))
println(format_result(validate("Bob", 200)))
